description.value: A viscous, heat-resistant oil extracted from the preen gland of an eblis. The oil has a faintly iridescent quality and feels warm to the touch even in cool air. Alchemists prize it as a key ingredient in brewing Potions of Fire Resistance. When applied directly to exposed skin, it provides a faint tingling warmth and minor protection against open flame for a few minutes—not enough to resist a dragon's breath, but sufficient to handle a hot coal or reach into a campfire unscathed.
